choose a throne:

Event: Magic Well - January 2025
Event Date: 23/01/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: CB32


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Emerald Forest Crossbow

When attacking, has a 30%-33% chance of dealing 145%-165% damage in 2 seconds.
Once in a while, the unit fires scorching bolts at 3 random enemies. On hit, the bolt deals magic damage equal to 165% of the crossbow owner's attack and incinerates the enemy for 4 sec. The enemy takes 80000 pure damage every second for 4 sec, and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated target take pure damage equal to 65% of the damage taken by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their max health and fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor, are reduced by 25% for 3 sec.

The unit's damage and physical armor piercing are increased by 15% for each incinerated enemy on the battlefield.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
